title: Air Wick Essential Mist Diffuser Kit, Morning Meadow by Stacey Solomon,1 Device & 1 refill (20 ml), Natural Essential Oils, Last up to 45 days, Air freshener
features: NATURAL FRAGRANCE -Experience the pure, natural scent of Morning Meadow, featuring jasmine and green apple notes.
LONG LASTING FRESHNESS - Enjoy continuous fragrance for up to 45 days.
ADJUSTABLE FRAGRANCE INTENSITY - Customize the fragrance level to your preference.
SLEEK AND MODERN DESIGN - Customize the fragrance level to your preference.
description: Product Description Air Wick Essential Mist Diffuser Kit, Morning Meadow by Stacey Solomon,1 Device & 1 refill (20 ml), Natural Essential Oils, Last up to 45 days, Air freshener Ingredients Distillates (petroleum), hydrotreated light, Alkanes, C11-15-iso-Dipropylene glycol monomethylether, LINALOOL, DIPENTENE, Limonene, Neryl acetate CITRONELLOL, Dimethylcyclohex-3-ene-1-carbaldehyde (isomer mixture), 2,4-DIMETHYL-3-CYCLO-HEXENE CARBOXALDEHYDE Directions Fill the diffuser with water and essential oils, then let it run automatically until it shuts off after 45 days. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. See more
